overview.industry: 信息技术,科研教育,金融贸易

subsections.title: 亮点卡片
content: - DeepResearch Bench排名第2：权威基准测试综合得分51.86，与第一名差距<1.5%
- 减少95%手动研究工作量：自动化资料搜集、信息整合，大幅提升调研效率
- 报告≤15分钟生成：快速输出高质量结构化调研文档，支持批量生成
- 支持开源大模型：节省90%成本，GLM-5等常见开源基座大模型

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 智能调研任务广泛应用于金融贸易、咨询管理、公共政策、市场营销、企业运营等行业的竞调行研、监督查阅、培训学习等场合，拥有广阔的使用需求和极高的使用频率。
**解决方案**: 本例根据用户输入的研究主题和关键词，自动搜集相关资料，基于智能流程进行知识提取与整合，最终按预设模板生成并输出调研文档。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，科研教育，金融贸易
**应用类别**: 服务，运营，管理
**技术类别**: 大语言模型（LLM），自然语言处理（NLP），智能体（Agent），检索增强生成（RAG），文本生成

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 人工调研效率低下：完成一份完整的调研报告（如行研报告、竞调报告等），具备专业知识的调研人员通常需要花费1-3周时间进行资料搜集、整理、分析、撰写
- 信息整合难度大：面对海量信息源，人工筛选和整合容易遗漏重要内容，且难以保证信息的准确性和时效性
- 报告格式不统一：不同人员、不同机构的行文风格与布局要求差异较大，影响报告的规范性与一致性
- 更新维护成本高：市场环境快速变化，人工更新和维护调研报告版本需要持续投入；组建调研团队或邀请专家也需要额外成本

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 全网资料搜集：基于用户输入的主题和关键词，自动在全网搜集相关资料
- 信息整合分析：对收集到的候选资料提取关键信息并生成观点与概述
- 自动报告生成：按照预设模板自动生成结构化调研文档

subsections.title: 3.1.1 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 效果领先：在 DeepResearch Bench 开源方案中排名第 2，生成内容稳定、可信，适用于正式业务决策场景。
- 生成更快：单篇报告 ≤15 分钟完成，显著快于同类方案与人工周级流程。
- 成本更低：支持高性价比常用大模型，在保持效果的前提下，整体成本降低 60%+。
- 企业可用：模板契合度 ≥95%，格式规范度 ≥99%，可直接用于内部汇报与对外材料。

subsections.title: 3.1.2 版本基本信息
content: - **版本类型**: 私部署-服务器部署版
- **团队名称**: Real-World AI自研及验证
- **关键依赖**: Claude Code · Metaso MCP · GLM

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: - 单篇文档调研准确率：报告模板契合度≥95%，格式规范度≥99%，提效格式修订等流程
- 单篇文档审阅时间：缩短至15分钟以内（人工需1周），支持大规模、稳定的批量生成
- 单篇文档人力投入成本：结合上述提效指标与下述技术指标，可减少人工操作与复核成本达95%、提升用户体验
- 单篇文档调研性能综合评估：DeepResearch Bench综合得分≥51，确保生成报告可信度

phases.title: PHASE 1 需求识别与团队构建

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - 业务对接人（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作
- 业务侧技术对接人（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作实际在用/预期涉及的技术功能与流程、建设与规划，辅助业务对接人在技术层面的沟通，建议首选架构师或技术型项目经理，其次为具体技术执行人员（如后端工程师等）
- 算法对接人（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的业界通行技术架构与流程、建设与规划，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 1. 业务对接人与算法对接人进行初次需求接触与头脑风暴交流，梳理该案例的核心需求
2. 业务对接人与算法对接人组建工作组及联络群，明确明确对接人与联络方式
3. 业务对接人（代表需求方团队）填写算法对接人（代表承做方团队）提供的项目合作需求问询书；如果已有较明确的构想、能拆解出多个子任务，可进一步填写子任务算法需求模板
4. 双方沟通补充需求确认所需的其他材料，如样例数据、专业知识参考资料等
5. 算法对接人协调自己团队，根据双方会议内容及反馈的文档和材料，展开需求评估

phases.title: PHASE 2 价值确认与需求细化

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - 业务专家（×1）：该案例对应业务工作中涉及核心业务模块的领导者、执行者或专家，协助业务对接人明确业务痛点与价值
- 产品经理（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，协助业务对接人细化需求，并设计原型，该职位可由承做方提供，可由业务对接人担任
- 算法专家（×1）：熟悉各场景与应用中业界目前的前沿与通用技术方案及选型，协助算法对接人评估需求，协调团队进行调研、设计方案与架构，协助评估排期，可由算法对接人担任

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 1. 业务对接人与己方业务专家及相关团队沟通，确认该方案实施的预期目标及业务价值，业务价值需要尽可能量化，并有对比数据（如现状数字、预期达成目标、预期相比现状改善的程度等）
2. 算法对接人与己方算法专家及相关团队沟通，罗列待确认事项，同时对方案进行初步调研、评估、设计
3. 产品经理与业务对接人和算法对接人沟通、梳理并明确需求，之后组织双方相关人员撰写初步验证需求文档
4. 双方根据初步验证需求文档进行需求确认，根据确认的需求规划排期、预算和资源。排期建议：首先以承接方完成初步验证、选型、产出Demo，并通过PoC为首个里程碑；之后双方进一步协商正式立项实施
5. 重复以上步骤直至初步验证需求文档定稿

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Intelligent research tasks are widely used in scenarios such as competitive research, industry research, supervision and review, and training and learning across industries including finance and trade, consulting and management, public policy, marketing, and enterprise operations. Demand is broad and usage frequency is extremely high.

**Solution**: Based on the research topic and keywords entered by the user, this case automatically collects relevant materials, performs knowledge extraction and integration through an intelligent workflow, and finally generates and outputs a research document according to a preset template.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Scientific Research & Education, Finance & Trade
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Agent, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Text Generation

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency of manual research: Completing a full research report, such as an industry report or competitive analysis report, usually requires researchers with domain expertise to spend 1-3 weeks on material collection, organization, analysis, and writing

- High difficulty of information integration: When facing massive information sources, manual filtering and integration can easily miss important content, and it is difficult to ensure information accuracy and timeliness
- Inconsistent report formats: Different people and organizations have very different writing styles and layout requirements, affecting report standardization and consistency

- High update and maintenance costs: Rapidly changing market conditions require continuous investment to manually update and maintain research report versions; building a research team or engaging experts also incurs additional costs

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Internet-wide material collection: Based on user-entered topics and keywords, automatically collect relevant materials across the internet

- Automated report generation: Automatically generate structured research documents according to preset templates

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection

- ⚡ Faster Generation: ≤15 min per report, significantly faster than alternatives (typically ≥20 min).
- 💰 Lower Cost: Supports high-performance & cost-effective models (e.g., GLM series), 60%+ cost reduction while maintaining quality.
- ✓ Enterprise Ready: ≥95% template match, ≥99% format compliance. Ready for internal and external use.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI Self-Developed and Verified
- **Key Dependencies**: Claude Code · Metaso MCP · GLM

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Single-document research accuracy: Report template fit >=95% and format compliance >=99%, improving processes such as format revision
- Single-document review time: Reduced to within 15 minutes (manual work requires 1 week), supporting large-scale and stable batch generation
- Single-document labor cost: Combined with the efficiency indicators above and the technical indicators below, manual operation and review costs can be reduced by 95%, improving user experience

subsections.title: 亮点卡片
content: - BIRD执行准确率75.63%：达到当前开源NL2SQL头部水平
- Spider Test EX 89.65%：经典评测集表现稳定领先
- SQL生成时间<1秒：适合高频取数与实时查询
- 人力成本降低50%：降低非SQL人员取数门槛

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 将用户以自然语言描述的查询需求转换为SQL查询语句。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **技术类别**: 大语言模型（LLM），自然语言处理，数据治理，基座大模型，模型评测，NL2SQL，数据库，运维

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法专家1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 传统数据库操作需要专门的运维人员或数据库管理员，对此类人员的SQL语言能力要求较高；而需要特定数据的算法人员，也存在学习SQL语言的成本
- 传统操作人工审批流程繁琐，效率低
- 数据流动高、数据量大，为任务带来额外挑战

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 用户指令理解：精准理解用户自然语言表达的SQL语言生成需求
- 最佳SQL脚本生成：根据用户需求筛选并获取多个候选SQL指令模式、从中整合、检查、排序，返回最优结果

subsections.title: 3.1.1 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 效果领先：采用 XiYanSQL-QwenCoder 系列，在 BIRD 上 EX 75.63%、Spider Test 上 EX 89.65%，处于开源头部水平。
- 响应极快：单次 SQL 生成时间不超过 1 秒，适合高频查询和在线交互场景。
- 准确可用：SQL 生成平均准确率达 95%，显著减少人工改写与排错成本。
- 降本显著：整体人力成本降低 50%，让不熟悉 SQL 的业务人员也能快速取数。

subsections.title: 3.1.2 版本基本信息
content: - **版本类型**: 私部署-服务器部署版
- **团队名称**: Real-World AI转载及验证

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: - 生成单次SQL脚本的时间不超过1秒
- 生成SQL脚本的平均准确率达95%

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 近年来，随着AI技术爆发与各行业智能化转型热潮，海量垂直行业非算法从业者迫切想要找到满足需求、适合自己的各类AI工具，但较难通过传统方式达到目的。面对此类垂直行业“信息不对称”现象，本例构建一个面向垂直领域AI工具选择的智能导引助手，以“专家咨询”方式，针对用户模糊、不完整（如仅输入“我要找个写文档的工具”）的自然语言查询，主动发起澄清式追问，通过有限轮次对话，逐步完成对用户的精准AI工具推荐。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，科研教育
**技术类别**: 智能体 (Agent)，大语言模型 (LLM)，自然语言处理 (NLP)，知识图谱 (KG），意图理解，检索增强生成（RAG）

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 模糊意图导致幻觉严重：用户常无法准确描述技术约束（如预算、部署方式、具体需求等），传统 对话机器人要么不够灵活，要么存在盲目猜测与推荐，导致结果错位（如向个人用户推荐昂贵的企业软件），可用性、置信度低
- 被动交互效率低下：传统 对话机器人在面对超出预设范围的输入时，倾向于输出“信息不足”等通用拒绝文本，缺乏建设性引导，导致用户需反复试探并自己完善表达后，才能让机器人明确需求
- 转化率与体验差：传统对话机器人多为被动回答，缺乏“专家级”的主动追问能力，对话易中断，用户流失率高，进而难以形成有效的业务转化和交叉推荐机会

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 追问引导 ：面对用户表达模糊的需求，对话助手不是直接回答，而是在1~3轮追问中细化并澄清用户真实需求

subsections.title: 3.1.1 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 追问能力强：REQ >95%，显著高于通用模型约 15%，有效缓解信息缺失场景下的幻觉。
- 推荐更准：TSR ≥90%、Q-ACC >92%，少轮对话即可收敛到可执行方案。
- 对话更短：平均不超过 3 轮完成需求澄清，用户从发问到解决的效率提升约 70%。
- 启动更省：低代码流程配合轻量模型可将启动成本降低约 80%，推理成本再降约 30%。

subsections.title: 3.1.2 版本基本信息
content: - **版本类型**: 私部署-服务器部署版
- **团队名称**: Real-World AI自研及验证
- **关键依赖**: Coze （by 字节跳动） · GLM

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: - 平均对话轮次 ≤ 3 轮：减少无效对话，用户询问流程提效70%
- 任务解决率 (TSR) ≥ 90%：用户最终获得满意推荐（基于采取行动（如点击链接或好评）统计）的比例
- 任务解决率 (TSR) ≥ 90%：同核心业务指标
- 首字响应延迟 < 5 秒：同核心业务指标
- 请求率 (REQ) > 95%：面对信息缺失查询时，对话助手主动发起追问的频率（GPT-4o该值约为15%），促进任务解决率提升（见核心业务指标）
- 追问准确率 (Q-ACC) > 92%：对话助手发起的追问命中核心缺失内容的准确度，高命中使得用户询问流程提效（见核心业务指标）

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Proactive follow-up rate exceeds 95%: About 15% higher than general-purpose models
- Task success rate >=90%: Recommendations align more closely with real user needs
- Recommendation completed in an average of <=3 turns: Improves user solution-acquisition efficiency by 70%
- 80% lower startup cost: The workflow can be built with low-code tools

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: In recent years, with the explosion of AI technology and the wave of intelligent transformation across industries, a large number of non-algorithm practitioners in vertical industries urgently want to find AI tools that match their needs and fit their situations, but struggle to do so through traditional methods. To address this information asymmetry in vertical industries, this case builds an intelligent guidance assistant for selecting AI tools in vertical domains. It works like expert consulting: when users provide vague or incomplete natural-language queries, such as I need a tool for writing documents, the assistant proactively asks clarifying follow-up questions and gradually arrives at precise AI tool recommendations within a limited number of dialogue turns.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Technology Category**: Agent, Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Knowledge Graph (KG), Intent Understanding, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Vague intent leads to severe hallucinations: Users often cannot accurately describe technical constraints such as budget, deployment method, or specific needs. Traditional chatbots are either not flexible enough or make blind guesses and recommendations, leading to mismatched results, such as recommending expensive enterprise software to individual users, with low usability and confidence

- Passive interaction is inefficient: When traditional chatbots face inputs beyond their preset scope, they tend to output generic rejection text such as insufficient information without constructive guidance, forcing users to keep probing and refining their own wording before the bot can understand the need

- Poor conversion and user experience: Traditional chatbots are mostly passive responders and lack expert-level proactive questioning, making conversations easy to interrupt, increasing user drop-off, and making it difficult to generate effective business conversion and cross-selling opportunities

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Follow-up guidance: When users express vague needs, the dialogue assistant does not answer directly. Instead, it refines and clarifies real user needs through 1-3 rounds of follow-up questions

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Strong follow-up capability: REQ >95%, about 15% higher than general-purpose models, effectively mitigating hallucinations in information-missing scenarios.
- More accurate recommendations: TSR >=90% and Q-ACC >92%, allowing the dialogue to converge to an actionable solution within a few turns.
- Shorter conversations: User needs are clarified in no more than 3 turns on average, improving end-to-end efficiency from question to solution by about 70%.
- Lower startup cost: A low-code workflow plus lightweight models reduces startup cost by about 80%, with inference cost reduced by another 30%.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI Self-Developed and Verified

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Average number of dialogue turns <= 3: Reduces ineffective dialogue and improves user inquiry efficiency by 70%
- Task Success Rate (TSR) >= 90%: The proportion of users who ultimately receive a satisfactory recommendation, measured by completed actions such as clicking a link or leaving positive feedback
- Task Success Rate (TSR) >= 90%: same as the core business metric
- First-character response latency < 5 seconds: same as the core business metric

- Request Rate (REQ) > 95%: The frequency with which the assistant proactively asks follow-up questions when facing information-missing queries; for GPT-4o this value is about 15%, and higher REQ improves task success rate
- Follow-up Accuracy (Q-ACC) > 92%: The accuracy with which follow-up questions hit the core missing information, improving user inquiry efficiency

- 模板覆盖率≥95%：可稳定生成核心信贷章节

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 信贷业务是银行业核心盈利来源，但报告撰写贯穿尽调、审批、贷后全流程，需投入大量人力处理数据收集、文本组织等重复工作，且面临数据来源繁杂、模板不统一、专业度参差不齐等问题，导致业务效率低、授信决策风险高。本案例基于垂直大模型，融合 Agent、RAG、OCR 等技术，构建自动化报告生成 Demo，通过多源数据无缝对接、结构化内容生成、合规校验，快速输出可信可用的信贷报告（授信 / 尽调 / 贷后等类型），助力银行信贷业务提效降险。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签

- 数据整合难度大：行内系统数据、第三方工商 / 征信数据、纸质财报 / 押品材料等多源异构数据难以高效整合，易出错
- 模板与专业度不统一：不同银行 / 部门报告模板差异大，部分人员缺乏专业财务与行业分析能力，影响报告准确性与决策可靠性
- 审核流程繁琐：报告输出标准不统一，人工审核需投入大量时间修正，导致流程难以自动化

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 多源数据自动整合：支持行内私有数据、金融数据源、第三方工商 / 征信 / 税务数据对接，结合 OCR 技术解析纸质文档，实现数据一键录入与校验
- 自定义模板适配：支持行方个性化报告模板配置与调优，覆盖授信、尽调、贷后风险评估等多类信贷场景
- 报告自动生成：智能拆解报告章节任务，自动匹配行方模板，完成 800 + 客观数据填充与 15 + 分析段落生成
- 数据溯源与合规校验：内置多源数据核验、金融合规审核规则，提供数据引用溯源，确保报告内容合规可信
- 人机协同编辑：支持报告润色、人工在线微调与格式排版完善，满足个性化修改需求

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Credit business is a core source of profit for banks, but report writing runs through the full process of due diligence, approval, and post-loan management. It requires substantial manual effort for repetitive work such as data collection and text organization, while also facing issues such as fragmented data sources, inconsistent templates, and uneven professionalism, resulting in low business efficiency and high credit decision risk. This case builds an automated report-generation Demo based on a vertical large model and technologies such as Agent, RAG, and OCR. Through seamless integration of multi-source data, structured content generation, and compliance checks, it rapidly outputs credible and usable credit reports for scenarios such as credit approval, due diligence, and post-loan management, helping banks improve efficiency and reduce risk.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Agent, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Optical Character Recognition (OCR)

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business (credit) expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency in manual writing: Report writing involves a large amount of data handling and text organization, is time-consuming and labor-intensive, and occupies core business manpower

- Difficulty in data integration: Multi-source heterogeneous data, including internal banking systems, third-party business registration and credit data, and paper financial statements or collateral materials, are hard to integrate efficiently and are prone to errors

- Inconsistent templates and professionalism: Report templates vary greatly across banks and departments, and some staff lack professional financial and industry analysis capabilities, affecting report accuracy and decision reliability
- Cumbersome review workflow: Output standards for reports are inconsistent, so manual review requires substantial time for corrections, making the process hard to automate

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Automatic integration of multi-source data: Supports connections to private internal-bank data, financial data sources, and third-party business registration, credit, and tax data; combines OCR to parse paper documents and enables one-click data entry and validation
- Custom template adaptation: Supports configuration and tuning of bank-specific report templates, covering credit approval, due diligence, post-loan risk assessment, and other credit scenarios

- Automatic report generation: Intelligently breaks down report-section tasks, automatically matches bank templates, and completes the filling of 800+ objective data points and generation of 15+ analytical paragraphs

- Data traceability and compliance checks: Built-in multi-source data verification and financial compliance review rules provide citation tracing to ensure that report content is compliant and trustworthy
- Human-in-the-loop editing: Supports report polishing, online manual fine-tuning, and formatting optimization to meet personalized revision needs

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Leading performance: The composite score on the evaluation set reaches 49, more than 41% better than the original manual-plus-semi-automated solution, ranking first among participating solutions.
- Faster generation: A single report is completed in <=15 minutes, 33% faster than comparable intelligent workflows in the market and about 160x more efficient than manual methods.
- Lower cost: Compatible with cost-effective models such as MiniMax-M2.1 and GLM-5, reducing overall operating cost by nearly 60%.
- Enterprise-ready: Template coverage reaches >=95% and content accuracy exceeds 90%, directly supporting credit approval, due diligence, post-loan management, and related scenarios.

- Report coverage >=95%: Core sections such as equity structure, credit standing, and interbank financial cooperation are generated automatically, improving coverage completeness
- Report content accuracy > 90%: The proportion of correct core data and analytical content in the report after data and text validation

- Based on the metrics above, report-generation efficiency is expected to improve by 160x compared with traditional manual entry and writing

overview.highlight: Nationwide industrial chain graph completed in 7 days

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Nationwide industrial chain graph completed in 7 days: 25x more efficient than the traditional 2-month process

- Graph accuracy reaches 89.32%: About 20% more accurate than traditional solutions

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Industrial chain graphs are core tools for industrial planning, investment attraction, and risk control, but traditional construction methods face long cycles, fragmented data, and delayed updates, making them hard to adapt to complex nationwide industrial ecosystem analysis. This case combines a knowledge graph framework, a low-code development platform, and multi-source data interfaces. Through template-based configuration, automated information extraction, and human-in-the-loop validation, it can complete node mapping, relationship construction, visualization, and analysis report generation for a single nationwide industrial chain within 7 days, covering more than 230 million digital industrial products and tens of millions of core enterprise records, and supporting scenarios across new energy, high-end manufacturing, electronic information, and more.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Knowledge Graph (KG), Agent, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Named Entity Recognition, Relation Extraction, Visualization and Design

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 industry analyst, 1 data validation specialist

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Long construction cycle: Building a nationwide industrial chain graph traditionally takes 2 months and depends on extensive manual sorting, making it hard to respond quickly to changing industrial dynamics

- Difficult data integration: Nationwide industrial data is scattered across official statistics, industry associations, commercial databases, and other channels, and heterogeneous data is difficult to integrate consistently
- Inaccurate relationship mining: Complex upstream-downstream, equity, and technical-cooperation relationships rely on manual judgment, making it easy to miss key links and potential risks
- High maintenance cost: Industrial nodes and relationships keep evolving with policy and market changes, while traditional updates are slow and labor-intensive

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Low-code template configuration: Provides 30+ industry graph templates and supports custom node types, relationship rules, and visualization styles

- Intelligent graph generation: Automatically extracts industrial entities such as enterprises, products, and technologies, mines relationships, and builds a six-dimensional hierarchy graph of resources - materials - components - products - services - data

- Dynamic visualization and interaction: Generates an interactive graph dashboard supporting geographic distribution layers, value-flow annotations, enterprise competition views, node drill-down, and multi-dimensional filtering

- Intelligent analysis report export: Built-in functions for industrial chain value distribution, key-node identification, and risk propagation simulation enable one-click export of industrial analysis reports and graph visualization files
- Fast update and iteration: Supports incremental data updates and automatic relationship validation, enabling one full-graph refresh each week to keep up with industrial changes

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Faster construction: The nationwide industrial chain graph is delivered in 7 days, about 25x faster than the traditional 2-month process.
- Broader coverage: Covers 230 million industrial products and tens of millions of enterprises, with more complete entity and relationship information.
- Higher graph accuracy: Graph accuracy reaches 89.32%, about 20% better than traditional manual-plus-machine-learning approaches.
- Lower cost: A 2-person team can complete the build. Combined with open-source models and a low-code platform, labor cost drops by 80% and operating cost by 60%.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI Self-Developed and Verified

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Graph construction cycle <=7 days: End-to-end time from data access to final graph delivery
- Entity coverage >=92%: The proportion of core entities such as target industrial-chain links, enterprises, and products covered nationwide
- Relationship mining rate > 90%: The proportion of upstream-downstream, partnership, equity, and other relationships correctly mined from the graph
- Data update response time < 24 hours: Time required to complete graph updates after new data or policy changes
- Analysis response time for custom dimensions < 3 seconds: Speed after a user launches analysis on a specific dimension such as regional distribution or technology route
- Low-code configuration efficiency improvement > 80%: Efficiency gain in graph-template configuration and adjustment compared with traditional coded development
- Entity extraction accuracy > 93%: Accuracy of large-model-based industrial entity recognition and disambiguation

- Data integration success rate > 98%: The proportion of effective access to and integration of multi-source heterogeneous data sources
- Concurrent graph visualization support > 1000 users: The number of users that can view and operate the graph simultaneously

- 生成页面内容准确率（相比输入的文字计划）达80%
- 为独立工作与研发者提供练习方案

overview.highlight: Built by 1 non-technical person in 1-2 days

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Built by 1 non-technical person in 1-2 days: A Demo can be completed without a full frontend-backend team
- 90% page content completion: A presentable page can be generated quickly from a text plan
- Interaction response under 0.5 seconds: Smooth page viewing and demo experience
- 50% lower upfront labor cost: Significantly reduces coordination input across product, design, and development

subsections.title: Demo
content: **[Two-Day Business Dashboard and Website Demo Video.mp4]**
(Preview of expected results. Video material is from [Lovable] by LovableAI and [Claude Code] by Anthropic.)

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: This case explores how users can quickly turn their website ideas expressed in text into a what-you-see-is-what-you-get Demo through web interaction using Agent technology powered by large models, and then share it with others for hands-on experience.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Technology Category**: Visualization and Design, Agent, Context Engineering, Agent Applications, Frontend Design

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert or product manager, no programming skills required

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - In recent years, demand for online promotional windows has continued to grow among small and medium-sized startups as well as many traditional enterprises, creating massive demand for business dashboards and website development

- Traditional approaches require coordination among product managers, UI designers, and engineers, across steps such as website design, UI drafting, frontend development, and sometimes backend development, resulting in high labor costs and long implementation cycles
- Traditional approaches involve cumbersome communication during prototype revisions and adjustments and often fail to achieve true WYSIWYG outcomes
- Traditional approaches may also require coordinating frontend and backend resources during demos while managing viewers' access and usage permissions

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Page generation: Based on user-entered prompts, optionally with uploaded materials such as layout outlines for the target page, the Agent generates the page
- Page interaction: The generated page supports demonstration of basic frontend interactive effects, such as dropdowns, selections, search bars, and simple conversations with a bot
- Edit-and-see results: Users can continue interacting with the Agent to update the generated page effects
- Shareable external link: The page Demo can generate a corresponding link for convenient sharing and presentation

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Faster setup: Typically, 1 non-technical person can complete the Demo within 1-2 days, much faster than traditional multi-person collaboration workflows.
- WYSIWYG: Page content completion reaches 90% and accuracy reaches 80%, with support for iterative adjustment during generation.
- Convenient sharing: Generated pages come with external links, making them easy to demo, review, and share externally.
- Lower cost: Upfront labor input is reduced by 50%, making it suitable for SMEs to quickly validate business ideas.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Team Name**: Real-World AI Self-Developed and Verified

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Interaction response latency is under 0.5 seconds, making the page easy to view at any time
- WYSIWYG delivery: the faster the turnaround from feedback to visible results, the better; the current typical speed is 1 week, with a target efficiency gain of 100%
- Generated page content completion rate (compared with the input text plan) reaches 90%
- Generated page content accuracy (compared with the input text plan) reaches 80%
- Provides an exercise solution for independent builders and developers
- Provides design and implementation inspiration for UI and frontend teams

3. The business liaison, together with the product manager (with UI designer support if necessary), clearly describes the functionality and effect plan of the target webpage to the algorithm liaison in text form
4. Both parties communicate and supplement other materials needed for requirement confirmation, such as website page diagrams, detailed website functions, etc.
5. The algorithm liaison evaluates the requirements based on the meeting content and the documents and materials provided

content: 1. The business liaison communicates with their business experts and related teams to confirm the expected goals and business value of the implementation; business value should be quantified as much as possible with comparative data (such as current numbers, expected targets, expected improvement compared to current status, etc.)
2. The algorithm liaison communicates with their algorithm experts and related teams to list items pending confirmation while conducting preliminary research, evaluation, and design of the solution

3. The product manager communicates with the business liaison and algorithm liaison to organize and clarify requirements, then organizes relevant personnel from both parties to write the preliminary verification requirement document

4. Both parties confirm requirements based on the preliminary verification requirement document and plan schedules, budgets, and resources according to confirmed requirements. Schedule recommendation: First, the contractor completes preliminary verification, selection, and produces a Demo, with PoC as the first milestone; afterwards, both parties further negotiate formal project initiation

overview.industry: 信息技术,行政管理,金融贸易,能源制造

subsections.title: 亮点卡片
content: - 30-100页文档审核提速90%：大幅缩短单份文书处理时间
- 章节完整度F1≥99%：结构化检查结果稳定可靠
- 审核人力成本降低80%：减少重复核查与协同沟通
- 通用PDF风险审查：适配金融、医疗等多类规范文档

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 文档的检查、审核和风险识别广泛应用于金融、医疗等行业，以及管理、运营等职能。本方案根据用户预设的规则与规范，自动解析用户输入的可编辑、半结构化PDF文件，对文件内容进行标题一致性、章节完整度等检查，并评估关键项的风险，最终将提取到的关键内容与评估结果生成JSON格式的报告输出。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，行政管理，金融贸易，能源制造
**应用类别**: 风控，管理，运营
**技术类别**: 自然语言处理（NLP），智能体（Agent），检索增强生成（RAG），信息抽取

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 人工审查效率低下、成本较高：审核1份30-100页的专项方案文书，业务人员常需辅助进行搜索、核实、溯源、沟通等操作，花费3-5小时时间，专业文书对业务人员能力有较高要求
- 人工审查错误率高：1日内连续审核5+份文书，漏检风险上升约10%，可能导致严重安全事故和法律诉讼
- 人工审查可追溯性差：发现问题点后，可能协调运维等部门排查日志才能确定文档的操作记录，溯源依据获取难度高、效率低

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 结构化处理：将使用自然语言书写的原文按篇章布局整理为结构化文本段
- 智能章节检查：基于预置规范和标准，由工作流自动对文本篇章做完整性检查
- 智能风险评估：基于预置规范和标准，由工作流自动对文中指定的关键信息做风险评估
- 标准化输出：基于预置的格式模板输出结果

subsections.title: 3.1.1 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 审核提效：30-100 页文档审核时间缩短 90%，适合批量文书快速处理。
- 风险更稳：章节完整度 F1≥99%，文本摘要 Faithfulness≥0.98，显著降低漏检与误判。
- 人力更省：审核流程人力成本降低 80%，可替代大量重复性核查工作。
- 泛化更强：布局感知解析结合规则化工作流，可快速迁移到多行业 PDF 审查场景。

subsections.title: 3.1.2 版本基本信息
content: - **版本类型**: 私部署-服务器部署版
- **团队名称**: Real-World AI自研及验证
- **关键依赖**: LangChain（by LangChain） · Pydantic（by Pydantic） · unstructured（by Unstructured.io） · Faiss（by Facebook） · GLM

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: - 审核1份30-100页文档时间缩短90%
- 文书审核流程人力成本减少80%
- 文书审核流程人为误差降低80%
- 章节完整度判断（F1宏平均）≥99%
- 目标字段相似度匹配准确率（Jaro-Winkler值）≥ 0.95

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - 90% faster review for 30-100 page documents: Dramatically shortens processing time for each document
- Section completeness F1 >=99%: Structured inspection results are stable and reliable
- 80% lower review labor cost: Reduces repetitive verification and coordination
- General-purpose PDF risk review: Adapts to compliant documents across finance, healthcare, and other domains

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Document inspection, review, and risk identification are widely used in industries such as finance and healthcare, as well as in management and operations functions. Based on user-defined rules and standards, this solution automatically parses editable, semi-structured PDF files provided by users, checks title consistency and section completeness, evaluates risks for key items, and ultimately outputs a JSON-formatted report containing the extracted key content and assessment results.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Administrative Management, Finance & Trade, Energy & Manufacturing
**Technology Category**: Natural Language Processing (NLP), Agent, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Information Extraction

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency and high cost of manual review: Reviewing a 30-100 page specialized document often requires business staff to assist with searching, verification, tracing, and communication, taking 3-5 hours; professional documents also demand strong domain expertise
- High error rate in manual review: Reviewing 5+ documents continuously within a day increases missed-detection risk by about 10%, which may lead to serious safety incidents and legal disputes

- Poor traceability in manual review: After an issue is found, teams may need to coordinate with operations and other departments to check logs before confirming document actions, making traceability evidence difficult and inefficient to obtain

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Structured processing: Organizes source text written in natural language into structured text segments by chapter layout
- Intelligent section inspection: Based on preset standards and rules, the workflow automatically checks the completeness of text sections
- Intelligent risk assessment: Based on preset standards and rules, the workflow automatically evaluates risks for specified key information in the document
- Standardized output: Outputs results using preset format templates

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Higher review efficiency: Review time for 30-100 page documents is reduced by 90%, making it suitable for fast batch processing.
- More stable risk control: Section completeness F1 >=99% and text-summary Faithfulness >=0.98 significantly reduce missed detections and misjudgments.
- Lower labor input: Review process labor cost is reduced by 80%, replacing a large amount of repetitive checking work.
- Stronger generalization: Layout-aware parsing combined with rule-based workflows can be quickly migrated to PDF review scenarios across industries.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI Self-Developed and Verified
- **Key Dependencies**: LangChain (by LangChain) · Pydantic (by Pydantic) · unstructured (by Unstructured.io) · Faiss (by Facebook) · GLM

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Review time for one 30-100 page document is reduced by 90%
- Labor cost in the document review workflow is reduced by 80%
- Human error in the document review workflow is reduced by 80%

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 本方案根据用户录制的视频素材及文字输入的需求设置，自动生成含有语音、字幕、背景音乐的介绍视频。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，金融贸易，科研教育
**应用类别**: 服务，运营，营销
**技术类别**: MCP工具，计算机视觉，语音与音频，ASR，TTS

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 中小量级公司对自家产品功能演示的需求始终保持旺盛，但预算有限，常需在高质量视频制作与高成本投入之间取舍
- 传统人工制作该类视频，至少需要录制、剪辑（可能含配乐）、配音等人员，人力成本较高，通常在100-1500元/分钟甚至更高
- 传统人工制作该类视频，剪辑素材、音频处理（去噪、对轴、配乐等）用时较长，通常从准备到完成约为7+日
- 传统人工制作该视频，若成品需要调整较为困难

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 基于ASR技术将视频原声转为字幕
- 基于TTS技术基于字幕生成语音
- 基于音乐生成技术基于字幕与用户告知的指令生成背景音乐
- 整合字幕、语音、背景音乐和原始视频，生成新的介绍视频

subsections.title: 3.1.1 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 交付更快：需求明确时最快 2.5 天即可完成，明显短于传统视频制作周期。
- 成本可控：1 分钟演示视频成本控制在 1000 元内，适合预算敏感场景。
- 工具成熟：组合近期主流 MCP 工具，覆盖 ASR、TTS、配乐等完整链路。
- 修改便捷：字幕、配音、背景音乐可自动化重生成，成片迭代成本低。

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标

- 产品经理（×1）：通常为该视频录制功能点的产品负责人，擅长沟通，协助业务对接人在技术层面的沟通
- 业务侧技术对接人（×1）：通常为该视频录制功能点的技术负责人，辅助业务对接人在技术层面的沟通
- 算法对接人（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的业界通行技术架构与流程、建设与规划，擅长沟通，有执行力

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 1. 业务对接人、产品经理与算法对接人进行初次需求接触与头脑风暴交流，梳理该案例的核心需求
2. 业务对接人与算法对接人组建工作组及联络群，明确明确对接人与联络方式
3. 业务对接人协同产品经理（必要时业务侧技术对接人参与支持）以文本形式向算法对接人清晰描述目标视频的内容与效果方案
4. 双方沟通补充需求确认所需的其他材料，如视频剧本、文案、视效材料等
5. 算法对接人根据双方会议内容及反馈的文档和材料，展开需求评估

subsections.title: 相关资源
content: - 脑图绘制工具：https://xmind.cn/ 或 飞书文档“画板”与“思维导图”功能
- 剧本及文案撰写工具：Word、Excel、WPS等

subsections.title: 结果产出
content: 1. 成立工作组，明确对接人与联络方式
2. 完成项目合作需求填写（即目标视频规划），对需求有初步梳理

phases.title: PHASE 2 价值确认与需求细化

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - 业务专家（×1）：该案例对应业务工作中涉及核心业务模块的领导者、执行者或专家，协助业务对接人明确业务痛点与价值

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 1. 业务对接人与己方业务专家及相关团队沟通，确认该方案实施的预期目标及业务价值，业务价值需要尽可能量化，并有对比数据（如现状数字、预期达成目标、预期相比现状改善的程度等）
2. 算法对接人与己方算法专家及相关团队沟通，罗列待确认事项，同时对方案进行初步调研、评估、设计
3. 产品经理与业务对接人和算法对接人沟通、梳理并明确需求，之后组织双方相关人员撰写初步验证需求文档
4. 双方根据初步验证需求文档进行需求确认，根据确认的需求规划排期、预算和资源
5. 重复以上步骤直至初步验证需求文档定稿

subsections.title: 相关资源
content: - 模板：[初步验证需求文档模板](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/PC8FwObgwiMwVPkM0i4cYkr2nYf?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 结果产出
content: 1. 初步验证需求文档：应包含目标视频的明确要求、规划、呈现效果等内容
2. 交付事项确认，如启动时间、验收时间、验收方案等

phases.title: PHASE 3 初步验证与立项

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - 算法工程师（×1）：掌握至少一门后端编程语言（如Python等）；熟悉 Docker；掌握常见智能体平台（如Dify 等）的私有化部署、大模型配置、MCP工具服务配置；了解一定的前端操作

subsections.title: 实施内容

4. 立项协议（附件应包含正式上线版本的交付、验收、排期、资源等内容）

phases.title: PHASE 4 正式上线与优化迭代

subsections.title: 实施内容

2. 按立项报告内容与排期计划来实施与交付
3. 按立项报告目标与流程来评审与验收
4. 按立项报告规划来进行运营与迭代

content: - 输入名称：视频压缩倍数计算 mcp 服务构建、启动

# 建议 python 3.10 及以上版本，如 python 3.11
# 注：通过 pip install -r requirements.txt 来安装
from typing import List, Tuple, Dict, Any
logger.add(log_file, level=log_level, rotation="00:00", enqueue=True, serialize=False, encoding="utf-8")
计算视频压缩时长分配 - 严格满足总时长约束，同时追求压缩倍率一致性
2. 如果key视频超出范围，将其固定在边界
3. 剩余时间严格分配给其他视频，确保总和=count_target
:param step_list: 其他视频时长的列表
:param key_range_target: Key视频压缩后的允许范围 [最小值, 最大值]
:return: 压缩后的key时长、其他视频时长列表、总时长、key压缩倍率、其他视频压缩倍率列表
logger.info(f"Calculating video compression: key={key}, steps={step_list}, range={key_range_target}, target={count_target}")
raise VideoCompressionError("Key视频时长必须大于0")
if not step_list or any(s <= 0 for s in step_list):
raise VideoCompressionError("Step视频列表不能为空且所有时长必须大于0")
raise VideoCompressionError("Key视频约束范围无效，需要[最小值, 最大值]且最小值小于最大值")
raise VideoCompressionError("目标总时长必须大于0")
# 1. 如果原始key小于k_min，压缩后应该使用k_min（相当于延长）
# 2. 如果原始key大于k_max，压缩后最多只能是原始时长
# 3. 正常情况下，压缩后不能超过原始时长
# 确定实际可用的约束范围
actual_k_min = k_min # 最小值保持不变，可以延长视频
actual_k_max = min(k_max, key) if key > k_min else k_max # 最大值不能超过原始时长
# 但如果原始key < k_min，我们需要特殊处理
# 原始时长小于最小约束，必须延长到至少k_min
actual_k_max = max(k_min, min(k_max, count_target - step_total * 0.5)) # 确保其他视频至少有0.5秒
# 原始时长大于等于最小约束，正常压缩
# 方案1：尝试统一压缩倍率
# 理想情况：统一压缩倍率
# key视频压缩后太短，固定在最小值
# key视频压缩后太长，固定在最大值
# 严格分配剩余时间给step videos
# 按原始比例分配剩余时间
# 检查是否因为最小值限制导致总和不等于remaining_time
if abs(current_step_sum - remaining_time) > 0.001: # 允许小误差
# 从最长的视频开始减少，但保持最小0.5秒
# 如果还有剩余（极端情况），可能需要调整key
# 需要增加一些时长，按比例分配到所有视频
# 最终微调确保总和精确等于count_target
# 特殊情况：key_compress已经占满或超过目标时长
# 剩余时间很少，平均分配给每个视频0.5秒
key_compression_ratio = key_compress / key if key > 0 else 1.0
for compressed, original in zip(step_list_compress, step_list)
# 最终总时长（应该正好等于count_target）
return key_compress, step_list_compress, count_compress, key_compression_ratio, step_compression_ratios
raise VideoCompressionError(f"视频压缩计算失败: {str(e)}")
视频压缩时长计算器 - MCP工具接口
用于计算多个视频的压缩时长分配，确保压缩后的总时长不超过目标时长。
主要应用于教学视频或演示视频的场景，其中包含：
- 展示效果部分（前10-15秒）：需要重点展示
- 步骤讲解部分：安装配置步骤的简要说明
- 参数含义：展示效果视频的原始时长（秒）
- 取值范围：大于0的浮点数
- 示例值：15.0 (表示15秒的展示效果视频)
- 说明：这个视频通常放在最前面，用于展示软件或功能的效果
- 参数含义：其余各个讲解视频的原始时长列表（秒）
- 取值范围：每个元素都是大于0的浮点数
- 约束：列表不能为空，所有时长必须大于0
- 说明：这些视频通常包含安装、配置、操作步骤等讲解内容
- 参数含义：展示效果视频压缩后的期望时长范围 [最小值, 最大值]
- 取值范围：[最小值, 最大值]，且最小值 < 最大值
- 示例值：[10.0, 15.0] (表示希望展示效果视频压缩后在10-15秒之间)
- 约束：必须包含2个元素的列表，第一个元素小于第二个元素
- 说明：用于控制展示效果部分的最终时长，确保足够的展示时间
- 参数含义：所有视频压缩后的目标总时长（秒）
- 取值范围：大于0的浮点数
- 示例值：60.0 (表示希望最终总时长为60秒)
- 说明：这是整个视频组合的目标总时长，算法会确保压缩后的总时长接近这个值
返回一个包含以下字段的字典：
- 含义：展示效果视频的原始时长
- 含义：讲解视频的原始时长列表
- 含义：展示效果视频压缩后的时长
- 特点：保证在 key_range_target 范围内或接近该范围
- 含义：讲解视频压缩后的时长列表
- 特点：按比例分配剩余时间，每个视频至少0.5秒
- 含义：所有视频的原始总时长
- 含义：所有视频压缩后的实际总时长
- 特点：应该接近或等于 count_target
- 含义：目标总时长（即输入的 count_target）
- 含义：展示效果视频的压缩倍率
- 说明：大于1表示延长，小于1表示压缩
- 含义：讲解视频的压缩倍率列表
- 说明：每个元素对应一个视频的压缩倍率
- 含义：展示效果视频的目标时长范围
- 取值：True 表示成功，False 表示失败
step_list=[30.0, 45.0], # 两个讲解视频，分别30秒和45秒
key_range_target=[10.0, 15.0], # 希望展示效果在10-15秒之间
1. 优先保持展示效果视频在指定范围内
2. 严格保证总时长接近目标值

logger.info(f"Video compression calculator request: key={key}, target={count_target}")

└── video_editing_skill.md # 视频生成流程文档 (必须)
# 企业级介绍视频制作标准流程
本文档提供了一套完整的企业级介绍视频制作标准化流程，基于MCP工具链实现从原始视频素材到精简成品视频的全自动化处理。
- **TTS时长优先**: 先生成TTS音频，视频压缩时长适配TTS
- **严格文本校对**: 确保字幕与原始文本高度一致
- **音画同步保证**: 确保音频、视频、字幕完美同步
- **用户确认机制**: 关键参数需用户确认
- **并行处理优化**: 提升整体处理效率
│ ├── number.title.suffix # 不同功能的录屏视频文件 (必须)
│ ├── text.txt # 文本素材文件 (必须)
│ └── bgm.wav # 背景音乐 (可选)（存在则必须用上）
- **内容结构**: 按视频序号分段，每段对应一个视频文件
接下来我们来看一下构建流程，新建工作流，导入之前准备好的工作流，点击保存就好了。
我们来添加模型，点击左边的模型再点击右上角的添加模型。我们选择这个接口格式，这边我们用的是第三方代理，点击保存就可以了。好，到这里，模型配置就完成了。
- 文字内容与视频画面内容匹配
- 语言表达简洁流畅，适合口语化表达
- 无特殊字符和复杂格式
- **要求**: 画面清晰，内容完整，音频清晰可识别
- **要求**: 时长 ≥ 最终视频时长，音质良好无噪音
校对精度: 字符级匹配
### 阶段2: 输入文件验证
1. 验证必需文件存在：`files/text.txt` 和视频文件
2. 解析文本素材，提取段落内容
3. 验证文本段落数与视频文件数量匹配
### 阶段3: 视频内容分析与用户确认
1. 获取所有视频的时长信息
2. 智能识别关键视频段（文件名包含"效果展示"、"demo"、"演示"等关键词或时长最长）
- 关键内容位置（开头/中间/结尾）
### 阶段4: TTS音频生成与时长计算
2. 逐段生成TTS音频到 `processed/audio/audio-tts-*.wav`（使用自然语速，不预设时长）
3. 获取每个TTS音频的实际时长
4. 记录文本内容与TTS实际时长的对应关系
调用"视频压缩时长计算器 - MCP工具接口"确定最终压缩参数：
1. 输入所有TTS音频的实际时长
2. 输入原始视频的时长信息
3. 根据目标总时长，智能分配各视频段的压缩时长
4. 生成压缩时长配置文件，用于后续视频压缩
### 阶段5: 视频/音频分离
1. 从原始视频中提取音频到 `processed/audio/audio-original-*.wav`
### 阶段6: 时长匹配压缩
基于阶段4.2计算的压缩时长配置执行视频压缩：
1. 读取压缩时长配置文件
3. 计算压缩倍率 = 原始时长 / 目标时长
4. 应用压缩倍率压缩视频到 `processed/video/video-compressed-*.mov`
5. 验证压缩后时长与配置一致（这一步很重要，必须要调用 MCP 工具来验证！），容差在±0.1秒内
基于TTS音频重新生成字幕：
1. 为每个TTS音频文件生成ASR字幕
严格校对ASR字幕与原始文本的一致性：
1. 计算原文与字幕文本的相似度
3. 相似度 < 95%则生成校对报告，要求人工校对
5. 确定最终使用的字幕文件
为每个视频段合成完整的音画字幕：
1. 生成静音音频作为第二音轨
2. 将压缩视频、TTS音频、字幕合成为完整视频段
3. 验证音画同步性（时长差异 < 0.1秒）
注：这一步必须调用 ffmpeg 相关 mcp 工具
根据用户确认的关键内容位置重新排序：
1. 根据用户偏好调整视频段顺序（关键内容可置前）
3. 按顺序合并所有视频段为最终视频
### 阶段11: 背景音乐添加
如存在背景音乐文件，并行生成多个版本：
│ ├── srt-final-*.srt # 验证通过的最终字幕
└── compression_config.json # 视频压缩时长配置
- **总时长**: 符合确认的目标时长
- **音视频同步**: 严格同步，差异 < 0.1秒
- **文本准确性**: 与原文档95%以上相似度
- **字幕同步**: 基于TTS音频生成，时间轴精确匹配
- **关键内容**: 根据用户偏好放置（推荐开头）

overview.highlight: A 1-minute demo video completed in 2.5 days

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - A 1-minute demo video completed in 2.5 days: Significantly faster than the traditional 7+ day production cycle
- Cost controlled within RMB 1,000: Suitable for low-budget delivery by SMEs
- Character Error Rate (CER) <=5%: Subtitle recognition quality meets demo needs
- One integrated workflow for subtitles, dubbing, and background music: Supports fast revision and finalization

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Based on user-recorded video footage and text-based requirement settings, this solution automatically generates an introduction video that includes voice-over, subtitles, and background music.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Finance & Trade, Scientific Research & Education
**Technology Category**: MCP Tools, Computer Vision, Speech and Audio, ASR, TTS

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Small and medium-sized companies consistently have strong demand for product feature demos, but limited budgets force tradeoffs between high-quality video production and high spending

- Traditional manual production of this type of video usually requires personnel for filming, editing, possibly music arrangement, and voice-over, with labor costs typically ranging from RMB 100-1500 per minute or even higher
- Traditional manual production takes a long time for editing footage and audio processing, such as denoising, alignment, and music matching, usually around 7+ days from preparation to completion
- Traditional manual production makes post-release revisions relatively difficult

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Convert the original video audio into subtitles using ASR technology
- Generate voice-over from subtitles using TTS technology
- Generate background music from subtitles and user instructions using music generation technology
- Integrate subtitles, voice-over, background music, and the original video to generate a new introduction video

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Faster delivery: When requirements are clear, completion can be as fast as 2.5 days, clearly shorter than traditional video production cycles.
- Cost under control: The cost of a 1-minute demo video can be kept within RMB 1,000, making it suitable for budget-sensitive scenarios.
- Mature toolchain: Combines current mainstream MCP tools to cover the full chain of ASR, TTS, and soundtrack generation.
- Easy revision: Subtitles, dubbing, and background music can be regenerated automatically, keeping iteration cost low.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI Self-Developed and Verified
- **Key Dependencies**: Claude Code · FFmpeg · FunASR · PaddleSpeech · Claude Opus 4.6

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Audio, visuals, and subtitles are synchronized, the video is clear and plays smoothly, meeting expected quality and ideally including value-added elements such as background music
- The production process is responsive, revisions are quick, and the final cut is completed within 1 week
- Production cost is controlled within RMB 1,000
- Speech naturalness passes subjective spot checks

content: - **Business Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making chains of the business work related to this case; skilled in communication; familiar with basic project management operations

overview.highlight: 零代码搭建完整教育工作流

subsections.title: 亮点卡片
content: - 零代码搭建完整教育工作流：按步骤配置即可上线趣味问答Demo
- 问答响应延迟<1秒：儿童互动过程流畅自然
- 支持连续互动5轮：具备完整启蒙训练体验
- 单轮回答准确率90%：保障题目与反馈质量

subsections.title: 演示
content: （预期效果展示，本视频为RWAI团队使用[两天半搭建企业级简要演示视频-已验证]制作）

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 快速搭建儿童智力启蒙趣味性应用（这里以脑筋急转弯为例）。通过AI技术生成反常规思维类、逻辑推理类不同题型。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 科研教育，文化体育
**技术类别**: 自然语言处理，文本生成，智能问答

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法专家1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 全人工教培通常将该类问答融入游戏过程中，不能独立体验，缺乏灵活性
- 人工教培使类似问答服务难以触达更广大潜在用户群体
- 拥有教培问答经验与知识的非技术人员难以开发一套应用

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 质疑问题（培养批判性思维）
- 构建完整的智力训练体验。

subsections.title: 3.1.1 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 零代码上手：基于工作流平台配置即可完成搭建，非技术人员也能快速复用。
- 响应流畅：问答延迟低于 1 秒，连续互动可达 5 轮，保证儿童使用体验。
- 内容可靠：单轮回答准确率达 90%，适合启蒙问答与趣味训练场景。
- 适合验证：工作流完整、步骤简洁，可直接作为教育类 AI 应用模板。

subsections.title: 3.1.2 版本基本信息
content: - **版本类型**: 私部署-服务器部署版
- **团队名称**: Real-World AI转载及验证
- **作者网站**: [手搓100个Workflow【活动】](https://dataelem.feishu.cn/wiki/OJYRwuJzZiUHhhkI4MLcMJvfnzh)（表格最后一行，作者为zh）

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: - 支持与用户连续互动轮次达到5轮
- 单轮平均回答准确率达到90%
- 可作为大模型爱好者的第1套搭建工作流练手项目
- 为有需求的家长提供一套0门槛搭建自用趣味应用的方案

phases.title: PHASE 1 需求识别与团队构建

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - 业务对接人（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作
- 业务侧技术对接人（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作实际在用/预期涉及的技术功能与流程、建设与规划，辅助业务对接人在技术层面的沟通，建议首选架构师或技术型项目经理，其次为具体技术执行人员（如后端工程师等）
- 算法对接人（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的业界通行技术架构与流程、建设与规划，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 1. 业务对接人与算法对接人进行初次需求接触与头脑风暴交流，梳理该案例的核心需求
2. 业务对接人与算法对接人组建工作组及联络群，明确明确对接人与联络方式
3. 业务对接人（代表需求方团队）填写算法对接人（代表承做方团队）提供的项目合作需求问询书；如果已有较明确的构想、能拆解出多个子任务，可进一步填写子任务算法需求模板
4. 双方沟通补充需求确认所需的其他材料，如样例数据、专业知识参考资料等
5. 算法对接人协调自己团队，根据双方会议内容及反馈的文档和材料，展开需求评估

phases.title: PHASE 2 价值确认与需求细化

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - 业务专家（×1）：该案例对应业务工作中涉及核心业务模块的领导者、执行者或专家，协助业务对接人明确业务痛点与价值
- 产品经理（×1）：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，协助业务对接人细化需求，并设计原型，该职位可由承做方提供
- 算法专家（×1）：熟悉各场景与应用中业界目前的前沿与通用技术方案及选型，协助算法对接人评估需求，协调团队进行调研、设计方案与架构，协助评估排期

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 1. 业务对接人与己方业务专家及相关团队沟通，确认该方案实施的预期目标及业务价值，业务价值需要尽可能量化，并有对比数据（如现状数字、预期达成目标、预期相比现状改善的程度等）
2. 算法对接人与己方算法专家及相关团队沟通，罗列待确认事项，同时对方案进行初步调研、评估、设计
3. 产品经理与业务对接人和算法对接人沟通、梳理并明确需求，之后组织双方相关人员撰写初步验证需求文档
4. 双方根据初步验证需求文档进行需求确认，根据确认的需求规划排期、预算和资源。排期建议：首先以承接方完成初步验证、选型、产出Demo，并通过PoC为首个里程碑；之后双方进一步协商正式立项实施
5. 重复以上步骤直至初步验证需求文档定稿

phases.title: PHASE 3 初步验证与立项

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - 产品经理（×1）：同PHASE 2，另需能熟练使用常见的无/低代码（“拖拉拽”方式）构建智能体工作流平台（如毕昇、Dify等）
- 算法工程师（×1）：掌握至少一门后端编程语言（如 Python、Java、Go 等）；熟悉 Docker，掌握常见智能体平台（如毕昇、Dify 等）的私有化部署、大模型配置；熟悉基于HTTP的API服务的封装

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 1. 在运行环境（云端或本地满足硬件条件的服务器）中安装 Docker
2. 通过Docker部署毕昇（BISHENG）平台，并启动平台
3. 本方案在毕昇平台已构建现成的工作流 json文件，到平台下载该方案，导入到已运行的毕昇平台
4. 完成大模型配置，并在启动的毕昇平台找到上面步骤配置好的应用，点击运行即可试用工作流
5. 结合具体业务场景，将脑筋急转弯工作流通过毕昇的API接入
6. 算法团队撰写初步验证报告
8. 双方密切沟通，确认是否正式立项
9. 若计划立项正式发布，双方就Demo效果调整方案，定稿立项报告，准备立项协议及启动事宜

overview.highlight: Build a complete education workflow with zero code

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Build a complete education workflow with zero code: A fun Q&A Demo can go live through step-by-step configuration
- Q&A response latency <1 second: Smooth and natural interaction for children
- Supports 5 consecutive interaction rounds: Delivers a complete early-learning experience
- Single-turn answer accuracy reaches 90%: Ensures question and feedback quality

subsections.title: Demo
content: (Preview of expected results. This video was produced by the RWAI team using [Enterprise-Level Brief Demo Video Built in Two and a Half Days - Verified].)

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Rapidly build a fun intellectual early-learning app for children, using brain teasers as an example here. AI technology is used to generate different question types, such as unconventional-thinking and logical-reasoning questions.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Technology Category**: Natural Language Processing, Text Generation, Intelligent Question Answering

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm expert

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Traditional fully manual education and training usually embeds this type of Q&A into games, so it cannot be experienced independently and lacks flexibility
- Manual education and training makes it difficult for this kind of Q&A service to reach a broader potential user base
- Non-technical people with experience and knowledge in educational Q&A find it difficult to develop a complete application

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Change the question (to keep things fresh)
- Ask for the answer (for immediate feedback)
- Challenge the question (to cultivate critical thinking)

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Zero-code onboarding: The app can be built through workflow platform configuration, allowing non-technical users to reuse it quickly.
- Smooth response: Q&A latency stays below 1 second and continuous interaction reaches 5 rounds, ensuring a good experience for children.
- Reliable content: Single-turn answer accuracy reaches 90%, making it suitable for early-learning Q&A and fun training scenarios.
- Good for validation: The workflow is complete and the steps are concise, so it can directly serve as a template for educational AI applications.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI Reproduced and Verified
- **Author Website**: [Hand-Built 100 Workflows [Event]](https://dataelem.feishu.cn/wiki/OJYRwuJzZiUHhhkI4MLcMJvfnzh) (last row of the table, author is zh)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Q&A response latency is below 1 second
- Supports 5 consecutive rounds of interaction with users
- Can serve as the first workflow-building practice project for large-model enthusiasts
- Provides parents in need with a zero-threshold solution for building a fun app for personal use

- **Product Manager (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making chains of the business work corresponding to this case, skilled in communication, assisting the business liaison in refining requirements and designing prototypes. Business value should be quantified as much as possible with comparative data (such as current status numbers, expected goals, expected degree of improvement compared to current status, etc.)
2. The algorithm liaison communicates with their algorithm experts and related teams to list items pending confirmation while conducting preliminary research, assessment, and design of the solution

3. The product manager communicates with the business liaison and algorithm liaison to organize and clarify requirements, then organizes relevant personnel from both parties to write the preliminary verification requirements document

4. Both parties confirm requirements based on the preliminary verify requirements document, and plan schedules, budgets, and resources based on confirmed requirements. Schedule suggestion: First, the undertaking party completes preliminary verification, selection, produces a Demo, and passes PoC as the first milestone; afterwards, both parties further negotiate formal project initiation

subsections.title: 亮点卡片
content: - 能源长预测MAE降至38.4%：较主流SOTA方案继续下降
- 选型与迁移成本降低50%：零样本也可快速覆盖新场景
- 3-5日完成预测Demo：验证周期压缩至1周内
- 预估减少5%业务损失：提升长时序预警可信度

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 长时序预测任务广泛用于能源等领域的各类特征指标的监测与预警场景，方便人们根据预测趋势及时察觉风险与异常、进而作出调整。
**解决方案**: 本例面向智慧能源（如电、水、天然气等）场景，输入该场景中指定特征的历史序列数据，输出未来长时间段内多个时间节点的预测值，通过引入2025年最新时序模型，捕捉长周期异常状态，为能源调度与管控提供可信决策依据。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **技术类别**: 统计机器学习，大语言模型（LLM），运维（测试&监控），时序预测

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 人工预测成本高误差大：人工预测需依赖从业人员经验，资深专家成本高，且无法同时持续对多类指标进行跟踪预测；普通人员判断能力有限，误差大
- 长周期预测稳定性差： 现有模型在预测未来720+时间点时，随着预测步长增加，误差显著放大，难以捕捉关键的周期性和突发异常，导致预警失效
- 交付可信度低： 现有各技术方案缺乏统一自动化基准测试流程，各机构组织的对比报告指标与结果各异，为技术选型与最佳实践带来困扰

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 零样本长程预测： 在未见过的新业务数据上稳定输出未来720+时间点的预测值
- 智能排序选型： 自动对比指定的各时序预测主流模型，生成排名结果，提供选型依据

subsections.title: 3.1.1 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 精度领先：MAE 降至 38.4%，较 iTransformer 和 PatchTST 分别再降 5.2% 与 3.6%。
- 迁移更省：零样本表现接近全量训练方案，选型与迁移成本降低 50%。
- 业务降损：预测误差下降后，预估可减少约 5% 的能源调度与风控损失。
- 上线更快：依托低代码框架，3-5 日即可完成 Demo，验证周期压缩到 1 周内。

subsections.title: 3.1.2 版本基本信息
content: - **版本类型**: 私部署-服务器部署版
- **团队名称**: Real-World AI自研及验证
- **关键依赖**: Autogluon （by AWS AI） · Neuralforecast （by Nixtla） · ETT数据集SOTA 模型

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: - 方案选型可信度提升10%（对比算法研究员）至70%（对比非算法从业人员），让业务人员也能快速、准确做出选择
- 方案选型、迁移成本降低50%
- 平均绝对误差（MAE）< 0.39 ，降低能源领域因长时预测误差带来的损失约5%
- 平均绝对误差（MAE）< 0.39 ：同核心业务指标

- 50% lower selection and migration cost: New scenarios can be covered quickly even in zero-shot settings
- Forecasting Demo completed in 3-5 days: Validation cycle compressed to within 1 week
- Estimated 5% reduction in business losses: Improves the credibility of long-horizon warning signals

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Long-horizon time-series forecasting is widely used in monitoring and early-warning scenarios for various feature indicators in fields such as energy, enabling people to identify risks and anomalies in time based on forecast trends and make adjustments accordingly.

**Solution**: This case is designed for smart energy scenarios such as electricity, water, and natural gas. It takes historical sequence data of specified features in the scenario as input and outputs forecast values at multiple future time points over a long period. By introducing the latest 2025 time-series model, it captures long-cycle abnormal states and provides a credible basis for energy scheduling and control decisions.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Technology Category**: Statistical Machine Learning, Large Language Model (LLM), Operations (Testing & Monitoring), Time-Series Forecasting

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Manual forecasting is costly and error-prone: Manual forecasting depends on practitioner experience, senior experts are expensive, and continuous tracking and forecasting across multiple indicators is not feasible at the same time; less experienced staff have limited judgment and high error rates

- Poor stability in long-horizon forecasting: Existing models show significantly amplified errors when predicting 720+ future time points, making it difficult to capture key periodic patterns and sudden anomalies and causing early warnings to fail

- Low delivery credibility: Existing technical solutions lack a unified automated benchmarking workflow, and different institutions produce inconsistent indicators and conclusions in comparison reports, complicating technology selection and best-practice decisions

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Zero-shot long-range forecasting: Stably outputs predictions for 720+ future time points on unseen new business data
- Intelligent ranking and model selection: Automatically compares mainstream time-series forecasting models and generates ranking results to support model selection

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Leading accuracy: MAE is reduced to 38.4%, a further 5.2% lower than iTransformer and 3.6% lower than PatchTST.
- Lower migration cost: Zero-shot performance approaches that of full-training solutions, reducing selection and migration cost by 50%.
- Lower business loss: With reduced forecasting error, the solution is estimated to cut losses in energy scheduling and risk control by about 5%.
- Faster launch: Built on a low-code framework, a Demo can be completed in 3-5 days, compressing validation to within 1 week.

content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition

- **Key Dependencies**: AutoGluon (by AWS AI) · NeuralForecast (by Nixtla) · ETT Dataset SOTA Models

- Mean Absolute Error (MAE) < 0.39, reducing losses caused by long-horizon forecasting errors in the energy field by about 5%

content: **Business Background**: Text translation is widely used in daily office work, cross-border business communication, research paper writing and reading, product localization, and multi-region distribution of operational content. **Solution**: To address this, this case proposes a privately deployable intelligent translation workflow. Based on the Gemini 3 Pro large model, which is currently at the SOTA level in overall translation capability, and combined with Gemini CLI and configurable prompt files, it delivers an integrated workflow covering text input, intelligent translation, quality evaluation, and result output.

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 金融机构的授信、投融资等业务中，一个项目通常涉及贷款合同、保证合同、抵押合同、公司章程等多类型法律文件。法审人员需要对多个合同之间的关键信息进行一致性、合规性与完整性核查，工作强度大、专业要求高，且在高负载下人工审核难以保证稳定准确率。

overview.highlight: 3 person-days of review compressed to 30 minutes

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - 3 person-days of review compressed to 30 minutes: Project-level legal review efficiency improved by 80%-90%
- Contract elements checked in 10 minutes: Single-item verification efficiency improved by 95%+
- One-rule-per-review avoids omissions: Scans each contract and each review point item by item
- Review rules can be reused long term: Marginal cost keeps declining

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: In credit, investment, and financing businesses at financial institutions, a single project often involves multiple types of legal documents, such as loan agreements, guarantee agreements, mortgage agreements, and articles of association. Legal reviewers must verify the consistency, compliance, and completeness of key information across multiple contracts. The workload is heavy, the professional bar is high, and under high workloads manual review struggles to maintain stable accuracy.

**Solution**: This arena focuses on the typical high-value scenario of project-level multi-contract legal review. The task is defined as follows: the input is multiple contracts and related supporting materials under the same project; the output is structured review results and explanations locating risk points. The core concerns are review efficiency, accuracy, rule reusability, and controllability under human-AI collaboration.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Technology Category**: Agent, Large Language Model (LLM), Data Governance

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 consulting advisor, 1 Agent engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency in manual review: A single project usually includes 5-6 contracts, and the traditional approach takes about 3 person-days to complete a full review, often requiring multi-person handoff and collaboration
- High risk of manual verification errors: In high-intensity continuous review scenarios, the risk of missed or incorrect checks across contract elements rises significantly
- Rules are hard to consolidate and reuse: Review experience depends heavily on individuals, making it difficult to form a standardized, modular review rule system
- Complex cross-document relationships: There are many implicit connections across contracts and between contracts and supporting materials, making manual comparison extremely costly

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Automatic extraction of contract elements: Automatically extracts key elements such as lender, amount, and reference number, and supports manual correction and confirmation
- Cross-contract review rule validation: Based on a rule library, checks consistency and compliance across multiple contracts within the same project
- Configurable review rule management: Supports user-defined review points, risk levels, and contract-type mappings
- Visual display of review results: Original-text positioning for risk points, highlighted annotations, and manual comments
- Intelligent retrieval of similar contracts: Assists legal reviewers with cross-comparison and decision support

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Faster review: The end-to-end workflow for a single project is reduced from about 3 person-days to 30 minutes, improving efficiency by 80%-90%.
- Faster verification: Checking contract elements for a single item is reduced from 0.5 person-day to about 10 minutes, improving efficiency by 95%+.
- More stable risk control: Code nodes and conditional branches scan rules one by one, reducing the risk of missed review, misreview, and hallucinations.
- Reusable rules: Review experience is turned into configurable rule assets, driving down long-term marginal cost.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Overall efficiency improvement in project-level contract review
- Significant reduction in manual verification time
- Continuous improvement in review-rule reuse rate
- Review results are traceable and reviewable
- Accuracy of contract element extraction (key fields in financial legal review)
- Rule-by-rule coverage rate (to avoid missed review)
- Controllability and stability under human-in-the-loop workflows
- Drives structured and systematic accumulation of financial legal review experience
- Provides a reproducible pattern for subsequent risk control and compliance automation scenarios

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 目标检测作为计算机视觉的核心技术，广泛应用于交通导航、安防监控、医疗影像、农林畜牧等领域。其中，“背景复杂、目标微小、干扰物相似度高”是目标检测任务面临的典型难题。
**解决方案**: 所提方案构建了一套含图像采集、精准识别、数据回流等模块的通用目标检测流程，利用YOLOv11 算法结合主动学习（Active Learning） 机制，自动捕捉低置信度样本并触发模型迭代，解决现有检测模型上线后因环境变化而导致的性能衰减问题。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，农林牧渔，能源制造
**应用类别**: 运营，管理，风控
**技术类别**: 计算机视觉（CV），运维（测试&监控），数据治理，MLOps

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法专家1名、MLOps工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 全量处理成本高昂： 在目标对象（如缺陷、杂草、特定商品）仅占区域 10%-30% 的情况下，现有方案多采用全区域覆盖式处理，导致70%以上资源出现浪费
- 极度相似目标误检：当目标对象与背景或非目标对象（如“拟态”干扰物）特征极度相似时，人工或现有方案易产生误判，导致严重业务损失（如误伤作物、漏检次品）
- 沉没数据价值归零： 传统作业过程缺乏数据留存，海量现场作业数据（特别是边缘与异常样例）未能转化为数据资产，严重影响模型学习与判断能力

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 精准目标过滤： 能够从大面积复杂背景中毫秒级定位指定目标，替代全覆盖模式，降低成本
- 精细化层级分类：建有多层级分类体系，提升对形态极度近似的干扰项的识别准确率，降低使用风险
- 自动数据采集：在作业过程中自动捕获高价值长尾数据备份，无需人工干预，积累数据资产

subsections.title: 3.1.1 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 检测更准：平均检测精度 mAP@0.5 > 92%，复杂背景下仍能稳定识别微小目标。
- 误伤更低：关键目标误伤/误报率 ≤5%，可减少高混淆场景的重大业务损失。
- 响应更快：P99 延迟控制在 30ms 内，比上一代通用方案再快约 15%。
- 成本更省：精准定位替代全覆盖模式，资源投入减少 50%-80%，数据资产还能持续回流。

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: As a core technology in computer vision, object detection is widely used in traffic navigation, security monitoring, medical imaging, agriculture, forestry, animal husbandry, and other fields. Among these tasks, complex backgrounds, tiny targets, and highly similar distractors are typical challenges.

**Solution**: The proposed solution builds a general-purpose object-detection workflow with modules for image capture, precise recognition, and data feedback. It uses the YOLOv11 algorithm combined with an Active Learning mechanism to automatically capture low-confidence samples and trigger model iteration, addressing performance degradation caused by environmental changes after deployment.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Agriculture Forestry Animal Husbandry & Fishery, Energy & Manufacturing
**Technology Category**: Computer Vision (CV), Operations (Testing & Monitoring), Data Governance, MLOps

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm expert, 1 MLOps engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - High cost of full-scale processing: When target objects such as defects, weeds, or specific goods account for only 10%-30% of an area, existing approaches often still use full-area coverage, wasting more than 70% of resources

- False detection among extremely similar targets: When the target and background or non-target objects, such as mimicking distractors, are highly similar in features, manual approaches or existing solutions are prone to misjudgment, causing major business losses such as damaging crops or missing defective products

- Sunk data loses value: Traditional operations lack data retention, so massive volumes of field data, especially edge cases and abnormal samples, fail to become data assets, severely weakening model learning and judgment capabilities

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Precise target filtering: Locates designated targets within milliseconds from large, complex backgrounds, replacing full-coverage modes and reducing cost
- Fine-grained hierarchical classification: Builds a multi-level classification system to improve recognition accuracy for highly similar distractors and reduce usage risk
- Automatic data collection: Automatically captures and backs up high-value long-tail data during operations without manual intervention, accumulating data assets

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - More accurate detection: Average precision mAP@0.5 > 92%, with stable recognition of small targets even in complex backgrounds.
- Lower false damage: Critical-target false damage/false positive rate <=5%, reducing major losses in highly confusing scenarios.
- Faster response: P99 latency is controlled within 30 ms, about 15% faster than the previous generation of general-purpose solutions.
- Lower cost: Precise targeting replaces full-coverage processing, reducing resource input by 50%-80%, while data assets continue to flow back into the system.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI Self-Developed and Verified
- **Key Dependencies**: Ultralytics YOLO (by Ultralytics) · Triton (by NVIDIA) · Perf Analyzer (by NVIDIA)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: - Save 50%-80% in resource input: Resources such as pesticide usage are applied only within precisely localized target areas, greatly reducing consumables and operating costs

- Long-tail sample data asset conversion rate reaches 98%: Automatically filters and retains high-difficulty long-tail samples such as low-confidence cases and conflicting results for subsequent training and upgrades, reducing useless data accumulation and storage costs
- Critical-target false damage/false positive rate <=5%: In highly confusing scenarios, protects non-target objects such as normal crops and is estimated to avoid 10%-15% of total property losses
